title: test_coverage score is 0.603 despite all tests passing
evidence: retort.db: test_coverage=0.603, defect_rate=1.0 (build+tests succeeded). 5 test functions in server_test.go all exercise core paths but code coverage is partial.
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases (invalid JSON, method-not-allowed, non-existent ID on update/delete) to increase coverage
